productName: Northwest CCELL® FULL SPEC Ceramic Cart - 1g - Super Boof [ H ]
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Super Boof oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
